How the Symbol Carries the Story Forward

The story can do useful work without proving everything inside it. At this stage, well creature motifs, recurring retellings, archive comparisons, source limits, and reader-facing interpretation helps identify circulation, recurring detail, and source limits rather than a final answer.

Frequently Asked Questions
